_description: Snippet to merge into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json under mcpServers. Adds outcomes-mcp as a remote HTTP MCP via the mcp-remote stdio shim (works on every Desktop version including those without native remote MCP support).
_install: 2. Add the 'outcomes-mcp' entry below into the mcpServers object
3. Replace BEARER_TOKEN_HERE with the value from /tmp/outcomes-mcp-bearer-token-tick9.txt
5. Verify outcomes-mcp appears in the MCP servers list and verify_outcome_pair is callable
